query: SELECT bl.id, bl.brandId, bl.liverId, bl.livestreamDate, bl.livestreamEndTime, bl.salesAmount, bl.duration, bl.viewerCount, bl.orderCount, bl.createdAt FROM brand_livestreams bl JOIN livers l ON bl.liverId = l.id WHERE l.name LIKE '%Ryu%' OR l.name LIKE '%kyogoku%' ORDER BY bl.livestreamDate DESC LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ViCMbGRGvoSuVwV.root --database GgA9WvTBCZMf6mjyMMwACw --execute SELECT bl.id, bl.brandId, bl.liverId, bl.livestreamDate, bl.livestreamEndTime, bl.salesAmount, bl.duration, bl.viewerCount, bl.orderCount, bl.createdAt FROM brand_livestreams bl JOIN livers l ON bl.liverId = l.id WHERE l.name LIKE '%Ryu%' OR l.name LIKE '%kyogoku%' ORDER BY bl.livestreamDate DESC LIMIT 10;
